_comment: Loom Workflow Template — Image Content Pipeline (6 steps). Pairs with video-workflow-template.json: video workflow writes content rows, image workflow picks up unposted rows and adds an image post.

workflow.name: <Your Page Display Name> Image
workflow.description: Daily image content pipeline — pairs with video workflow

steps._comment: Step 0 — Pick an unposted row from the content table (one whose 'image' column is still empty).
steps.name: Get Unposted Row

steps._comment: Step 1 — Convert the script into a detailed image-generation prompt.
steps.name: Gen Image Prompt

config.system_prompt:
You convert social-media content into detailed image-generation prompts. Output:
- Highly detailed and specific
- Natural language (no JSON / no parameters)
- Photorealistic style by default unless the content calls for illustration
config.user_prompt:
Content: {{Get Unposted Row.script}}

Generate an image prompt for a square social media image that visually represents this content. Photorealistic, vibrant, attention-grabbing. No text or letters inside the image.

steps._comment: Step 3 — Post the image with the original script as the caption.
steps.name: Post Facebook

steps._comment: Step 4 — Optional first comment (CTA / affiliate link). Delete if not needed.
steps.name: First Comment

config.message: <Your CTA, affiliate link, or follow-up comment here>

steps._comment: Step 5 — Mark the row's 'image' column as posted.
steps.name: Update Posting Status
